reasoning: The composited touch_summon_button_v07 (the large circular '黏黏球' icon placed in the scene center) measures approximately 130x130px in a scene where the player is 32x32px — roughly 4x the player size. Button category items must adhere to HUD icon limits (≤24x24) or at most item rules (50–75% of player, never larger). This element is ~400% of player size, far exceeding every threshold. It visually dominates the entire play area, overwhelming the scene elements (pressure plate, room tiles, enemy nest) and producing a 'zoomed-in wallpaper' feel rather than the intended toy-diorama proportion. The actual UI action buttons in the bottom-right corner (召唤/攻击) are appropriately sized; only the composited asset is out of scale.
